name: json-canvas
tagline: Creates and edits Obsidian JSON Canvas (.canvas) files: nodes, edges, groups, and connections for mind maps and flowcharts.
verdict: Thorough, self-contained schema reference: concrete workflows, per-node-type examples, an ID-collision-aware re-run process, and a validation checklist that doubles as failure-mode guidance. No security concerns (pure local JSON editing, no network or shell commands). Weak spots: no stated out-of-scope cases so it could misfire on adjacent tasks, and no.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope language anywhere in description or body.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in frontmatter or body.
